page_metadata.biotools__summary: Identification of peptides from LC-MS/MS spectra. It is based on a similarity search of mass spectra in a database of theoretical spectra generated from a database of known protein sequences.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Identification of peptides from LC-MS/MS spectra. It is based on a similarity search of mass spectra in a database of theoretical spectra generated from a database of known protein sequences.
